idea-plugin.name: Dynatrace Mobile Wizard
idea-plugin.description:
Dynatrace Mobile Wizard is a guided setup tool for Android developers that automatically configures the Dynatrace OneAgent Mobile SDK in your project — no manual Gradle editing required.

Open it from Tools → Dynatrace Wizard…, right-click in the editor, or right-click in the Project view. The wizard detects your project structure and walks you through every step.

What it does

  • Project detection — identifies Gradle DSL (Kotlin or Groovy), module layout, existing Dynatrace configuration, and the optimal plugin approach (Plugin DSL vs buildscript classpath)
  • Multi-module support — single-app, multi-app, and dynamic feature module projects; per-module Application ID and Beacon URL; optional OneAgent SDK for library modules
  • Environment setup — validates Application ID and Beacon URL with inline feedback
  • Technology overview — shows which Dynatrace monitoring capabilities apply to your stack
  • Full feature control — toggles for crash reporting, user actions, web request monitoring, Jetpack Compose instrumentation, hybrid (WebView) monitoring, location, privacy, rage-tap detection, build-variant targeting, class/method exclusions, and more
  • Change preview — shows the exact Gradle code that will be written before you commit
  • Safe writes — every file edit uses WriteCommandAction, making all changes fully undoable via Edit → Undo

Wizard tabs

  1. Welcome — detects Android project, DSL, module structure, and setup flow
  2. Modules — select which app modules to instrument; configure approach for multi-app projects
  3. Environment — enter Application ID and Beacon URL (per-module for multi-app)
  4. Technologies — supported technology overview for your project's dependencies
  5. Features — enable/disable individual instrumentation capabilities
  6. Skills — export a reusable Markdown skills.md for AI coding agents
  7. Summary — full Gradle code preview; click Finish to apply

Supported project types

  • Single-module Android apps
  • Multi-module projects (app + library + dynamic feature modules)
  • Kotlin DSL (build.gradle.kts) and Groovy DSL (build.gradle)
  • Plugin DSL (plugins {}) and legacy buildscript classpath approach

Requirements

  • IntelliJ IDEA 2024.1+ or Android Studio Koala+
  • An Android project with at least one com.android.application module
  • A Dynatrace account with a configured Mobile application (Application ID + Beacon URL)

action.description: Open the Dynatrace Mobile SDK configuration wizard
